title: calendula persica var. gracilis
intro: Calendula persica var. gracilis is a lesser-known variety of the calendula plant, characterized by its slender stems and delicate flowers. The medicinal properties of Calendula persica var. gracilis are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of this plant include promoting skin health, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system. Calendula persica var. gracilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or salve, which can be used topically to soothe and heal various skin conditions.
